title: Section 26224.2
text: The articles of incorporation of any association may be amended in the manner and for the purposes which are authorized by the General Corporation Law, Division 1 (commencing with Section 100) of Title 1 of the Corporations Code. (Added by Stats. 2017, Ch. 27, Sec. 107. (SB 94) Effective June 27, 2017.) BPC Business and Professions Code - BPC 4.
